capabilities.title: Local dashboard
capabilities.summary: View controllers, zones, active watering, upcoming schedules, watering history, events, and sanitized logs in one local interface.
details: Pause live logs automatically while selecting text or inspecting older entries, then resume at the latest entry.
Copy sanitized log entries and responses, and open controller status details with a user-triggered one-time retry.

capabilities.title: Manual watering
capabilities.summary: Start and stop individual zones with configurable run-time caps and safeguards against conflicting known activity.

capabilities.title: Program controls
capabilities.summary: Enable, disable, start, and edit supported fields on existing Orbit programs while keeping smart programs read-only.
details: Program changes are snapshotted locally before the Orbit API is updated.

capabilities.title: Named yard runs
capabilities.summary: Run locally configured groups such as a front yard, garden, or planter sequence one zone at a time.
details: Adjust minutes per zone before starting.
Queue additional runs without watering shared zones twice.
Stop the active zone and clear the remaining queue from one control.
Recover the active queue display after a local server restart.

capabilities.title: Local browser write access
capabilities.summary: Keep same-computer loopback controls prompt-free or require the app token for every browser.
details: The older trusted-network mode remains for private-development compatibility and is not a supported public deployment.

capabilities.title: Optional desktop apps
capabilities.summary: Run the same local controller in a macOS SwiftUI wrapper or a Windows WPF and WebView2 wrapper.
details: Both wrappers verify the local controller before loading its embedded dashboard.
Windows includes a per-user setup flow with encrypted credential storage and a read-only Orbit login test.

capabilities.title: Searchable offline Help
capabilities.summary: Open the bundled setup, daily-use, privacy, and troubleshooting guide from the dashboard or either desktop wrapper without starting the controller server.

developmentCommands.label: Regenerate project documentation and run all checks
Regenerate the README and shared Help capability summary without running tests
Check generated documentation for drift without changing files
Check canonical package identity and platform versions for drift
Scan tracked and untracked repository files for private data
Audit production dependencies for high-severity vulnerabilities

wrapperBuildCommands.label: Create the Windows package with a bundled .NET runtime
